note: Web-only Capsule completion polish. Builds on v172/v173 with NO consensus, NO RPC schema, and NO transaction wire-format changes. Ensures wallet.sostcore.com root also activates the Capsule hotfix by loading security.js after rewriting the in-page path to /sost-wallet.html. Patches the transactions documentation at runtime so Document Reference is no longer described as CLI-only: it is now web wallet + CLI, with browser-side SHA-256 and only hash/size/locator stored on-chain. Sealed/encrypted Capsule modes remain PLANNED because they need recipient public keys and one ECIES envelope per recipient. Force-reload wallet/docs tabs with Ctrl+Shift+R.
